mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_REPLY.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO REPLY ( REPLY_ID, REPLY_CONTENT, CREATE_DATE, BOARD_ID, USER_ID, DELETE_DATE, MODIFY_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_REPLY.NEXTVAL, #{replyContent}, SYSDATE, #{boardId}, #{userId}, NULL, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT R.REPLY_ID AS replyId, R.REPLY_CONTENT AS replyContent, R.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, R.BOARD_ID AS boardId, R.USER_ID AS userId, T.TITLE_NAME AS userTitle, T.TITLE_IMG_URL AS userTitleImgUrl, T.TITLE_COLOR AS userColor, R.DELETE_DATE AS deleteDate, R.MODIFY_DATE AS modifyDate FROM REPLY R LEFT JOIN MEMBER_TITLES MT ON R.USER_ID = MT.USER_ID AND MT.IS_EQUIPPED = 'Y' LEFT JOIN TITLES T ON MT.TITLE_ID = T.TITLE_ID WHERE R.BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND R.DELETE_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY R.CREATE_DATE ASC

SELECT R.REPLY_ID AS replyId, R.REPLY_CONTENT AS replyContent, R.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, R.BOARD_ID AS boardId, R.USER_ID AS userId, T.TITLE_NAME AS userTitle, T.TITLE_IMG_URL AS userTitleImgUrl, T.TITLE_COLOR AS userColor, R.DELETE_DATE AS deleteDate, R.MODIFY_DATE AS modifyDate FROM REPLY R LEFT JOIN MEMBER_TITLES MT ON R.USER_ID = MT.USER_ID AND MT.IS_EQUIPPED = 'Y' LEFT JOIN TITLES T ON MT.TITLE_ID = T.TITLE_ID WHERE R.USER_ID = #{userId} AND R.DELETE_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY R.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE REPLY SET REPLY_CONTENT = #{replyContent}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE REPLY_ID = #{replyId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
UPDATE REPLY SET DELETE_DATE = SYSDATE, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE REPLY_ID = #{replyId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
